text: - (a) For the duration of the contract and Warranty Period, the Subcontractor shall comply with all local, state, federal, and/or any governing authority's ordinances, codes, regulations and/or laws applicable or potentially applicable  to  the  project.  Subcontractor  understands  that  this  contract  may  be  terminated  for  default  if  any governing  authority  determines  that  any  breach  of  applicable  codes,  ordinances,  regulations  and  laws  by Subcontractor, its agents, employees or subcontractors has occurred and/or has not been corrected to the satisfaction of that governing authority.
